stemHtml: An aircraft cruising at flight level 350 is cleared to climb to FL380, despite this being higher than its optimum cruising altitude. Upon reaching FL380, the aircraft begins to experience clear air turbulence (CAT). Soon after, it is affected by Mach buffet. What could reasonably explain this situation?

options.b: An acceleration of more than 1.3g is experienced.
options.d: Descending into denser air reduced aerodynamic damping.
